description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a bullpup configuration, featuring a compact and robust design. The body is primarily matte black with metallic and polymer components, and it includes a prominent top-mounted rail system for optics or accessories. The shotgun has a short, thick barrel with a visible muzzle brake and a sturdy, angular fore-end. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, with a pistol grip and a large, boxy magazine well beneath the action. The trigger guard is elongated and rectangular, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Additional details include a mounted sight and various attachment points, giving it a high-tech, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, tactical bullpup shotgun with a matte black finish, top rail, and integrated stock. Features include a short barrel, pistol grip, and boxy magazine well.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, barrel, and the alignment of the top rail and sight.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, the top rail, sight, pistol grip, and boxy magazine well.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, the symmetry of the design, and the alignment of the barrel and rail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, trigger guard, and additional details of the magazine well and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with a visible muzzle brake and no ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: full stock (bullpup configuration, integrated into the rear of the weapon)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated and rectangular, large with straight edges and no finger grooves
